markers.label: Demo: elevated inland risk (Central FL)
markers.detail: Sample marker for map styling when the live API is offline. Not a real alert.

markers.label: Demo: moderate risk (South FL)
markers.detail: Illustrates orange-tier risk. Connect API for live USGS + NWS.

markers.label: Demo: high risk (West Coast)
markers.detail: Sample only — verify with official sources when API is online.

_note: Demo markers keep the map readable when the API is down. Run: backend/ → uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
